<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\File\Exception; /** * Thrown when an UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE error occurred with UploadedFile. * * @author Florent Mata <florentmata@gmail.com> */ class FormSizeFileException extends FileException { }
